# Cross-Track Handoff

## Metadata

```text
Handoff ID:
Version:
Sending track:
Receiving track:
Date:
Result status:
Object or theorem IDs:
Sending commit:
```

## Exact object transferred

State the theorem, conjecture, requirement, counterexample, dataset, or verifier exactly.

## Exact hypotheses

List every assumption and range.

## Dependencies

| ID | Status | Location |
|---|---|---|
| | | |

## Files

List every file included in the handoff and its purpose.

## Verification

```text
Environment:
Command:
Expected output:
```

## Known limitations

List all ranges, unproved dependencies, performance limits, and unsupported interpretations.

## What is not claimed

State explicitly what the receiver must not infer.

## Requested receiver action

State the precise review, theorem, computation, or integration action requested.

## Receiver resolution

```text
Reviewer:
Outcome: ACCEPTED / ACCEPTED_WITH_RESTRICTIONS / REJECTED / NEEDS_REPAIR / SUPERSEDED
Restrictions:
Findings:
Date:
```
